title: MAXPOWER Adjustable Spanner Set, 2-in-1 Adjustable Wrench Set, Plumbing Wrench Pipe Wrench with Reversible Wide Opening Jaw (6"/150mm and 8"/200mm)
features: 2-IN-1 MULTIFUNCTIONAL WRENCHES: You may use them as a Adjustable spanner or a Pipe Wrench. 2 sizes (6"/150mm and 8"/200mm) will meet your different application needs.

REVERSIBLE JAW DESIGN: he wide opening reversible jaw with serrated edge makes it possible for griping round screws or pipes. It can be used as an adjustable wrench and a pipe wrench for mechanics, plumbers or DIY enthusiast.
MAX JAW CAPACITY: 35mm opening capacity for 150mm (6-Inch) adjustable spanner. 48mm opening capacity for 200mm (8-Inch) adjustable spanner. 55% Wider jaw than standard wrench.
WIDE APPLICATION: This Adjustable Plumbing Spanner Set is ideal for plumbing, car or bicycle repair, wash basins installation, house maintenance, tube nut disassembly, gas industry work, etc.

DUAL-SIDES SCALE: SAE & Metric double-sided scale for clear reading. It is easy to adjust the jaw with the smooth knurl roller. Chrome vanadium steel (Cr-V material) forging makes the multi-function wrench more durable to use.
